title.en: China-to-Costa Rica Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入哥斯达黎加：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入哥斯大黎加：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Costa Rica INTECO conformity requirements, ARESEP regulatory framework, ICE and distributor (CNFL, Coopeguanacaste, JASEC, ESPH) grid-interconnection rules under the generación distribuida para autoconsumo net-metering scheme, IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding at 60 Hz, IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-series EMC, 60 Hz / 120-240 V Americas-standard grid settings — versus China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 baselines. Key distinction: Costa Rica operates at 60 Hz / 120-240 V, fundamentally different from China's 50 Hz / 220-380 V grid, requiring reconfiguration and retesting of inverter grid-protection and anti-islanding firmware.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与哥斯达黎加INTECO合格评定要求、ARESEP监管框架、ICE及配电商（CNFL、Coopeguanacaste、JASEC、ESPH）在「分布式自用发电」净计量方案下的并网规则、IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据、60 Hz频率下IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 62920及IEC 61000系列EMC、60 Hz / 120-240 V美洲标准电网参数——对比中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基准的差距对照。关键区别：哥斯达黎加采用60 Hz / 120-240 V，与中国50 Hz / 220-380 V电网根本不同，需对逆变器电网保护和防孤岛固件进行重新配置和测试。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與哥斯大黎加INTECO合格評定要求、ARESEP監管框架、ICE及配電商（CNFL、Coopeguanacaste、JASEC、ESPH）在「分散式自用發電」淨計量方案下的併網規則、IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據、60 Hz頻率下IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 62920及IEC 61000系列EMC、60 Hz / 120-240 V美洲標準電網參數——對比中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基準的差距對照。關鍵區別：哥斯大黎加採用60 Hz / 120-240 V，與中國50 Hz / 220-380 V電網根本不同，需對逆變器電網保護和防孤島韌體進行重新配置和測試。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, INTECO conformity scope determination, ARESEP regulatory approval, ICE or distributor grid-interconnection approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Costa Rica INTECO technical standards, ARESEP regulatory requirements, ICE and distributor generación distribuida interconnection rules, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、INTECO合格评定范围裁定、ARESEP监管批准、ICE或配电商并网批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行哥斯达黎加INTECO技术标准、ARESEP监管要求、ICE及配电商「分布式自用发电」并网规则及项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、INTECO合格評定範圍裁定、ARESEP監管批准、ICE或配電商併網批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行哥斯大黎加INTECO技術標準、ARESEP監管要求、ICE及配電商「分散式自用發電」併網規則及項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Costa Rica, the most critical practical gaps are: (1) the fundamental grid parameter difference — Costa Rica operates at 60 Hz / 120-240 V (single-phase split-phase), whereas China inverters are factory-configured for 50 Hz / 220-380 V; this requires firmware reconfiguration and retesting before any grid interconnection; (2) IEC 62116 anti-islanding compliance validated at 60 Hz — Chinese anti-islanding test results at 50 Hz do not transfer; (3) IEC 62109-1/-2 safety type-test evidence for the inverter model; (4) compliance with ARESEP's generación distribuida para autoconsumo regulatory framework and ICE or relevant distributor interconnection requirements; (5) INTECO conformity where applicable. China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 (all 50 Hz-based) do not satisfy Costa Rica ICE/ARESEP interconnection requirements and cannot be substituted without supplementary IEC test evidence validated at 60 Hz.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口哥斯达黎加时，最关键的实际差距包括：（1）根本性电网参数差异——哥斯达黎加采用60 Hz / 120-240 V（单相分相），而中国逆变器出厂默认配置为50 Hz / 220-380 V；并网前须重新配置固件并重新测试；（2）在60 Hz下经验证的IEC 62116防孤岛合规——中国50 Hz防孤岛测试结果不可移植；（3）该逆变器型号的IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式试验证据；（4）符合ARESEP「分布式自用发电」监管框架及ICE或相关配电商并网要求；（5）适用时符合INTECO合格评定要求。中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964（均基于50 Hz）不满足哥斯达黎加ICE/ARESEP并网要求，在无60 Hz验证的补充IEC测试证据的情况下不可替代。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口哥斯大黎加時，最關鍵的實際差距包括：（1）根本性電網參數差異——哥斯大黎加採用60 Hz / 120-240 V（單相分相），而中國逆變器出廠預設配置為50 Hz / 220-380 V；併網前須重新配置韌體並重新測試；（2）在60 Hz下經驗證的IEC 62116防孤島合規——中國50 Hz防孤島測試結果不可移植；（3）該逆變器型號的IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式試驗證據；（4）符合ARESEP「分散式自用發電」監管框架及ICE或相關配電商併網要求；（5）適用時符合INTECO合格評定要求。中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964（均基於50 Hz）不滿足哥斯大黎加ICE/ARESEP併網要求，在無60 Hz驗證的補充IEC測試證據的情況下不可替代。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
